hadith_entries.text:
329. Narrated by Jareer ibn Abdullah : 'The Prophet
said to me during Hajjatol Wada'a (the last pilgrimage of the
Prophet ): "Let the people keep silent (and listen)." Then he
addressed them: "Do not become non-believers after me by
striking the necks (cutting the throats) of one another (killing
each other)." (Bukhari).
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
-
